Requires the following access scope: write_shipping"},"metaobjects":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaobjectNamespaces"}},"definitions":{"MetafieldsOptions":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["api_version"],"properties":{"api_version":{"$ref":"#/definitions/ApiVersion"}},"title":"Custom Data","description":"Shopify's platform includes data models for fundamental commerce concepts such as products, collections, and orders out of the box. However, commerce is diverse and often requires more complex or specific data models. The custom data platform enables you to extend Shopify's data models and create your own by using the following resources:

- [Metafields](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/custom-data/metafields): Define and associate custom fields with Shopify resources such as products.

- [Metaobjects](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/custom-data/metaobjects): Define and create custom data structures within Shopify."},"ApiVersion":{"type":"string","enum":["2025-04","2025-07","2025-10","2026-01","2026-04","unstable"],"title":"Admin API","description":"The Admin API lets you build apps and integrations that extend and enhance the Shopify admin."},"MetaobjectNamespaces":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"anyOf":[{"required":["app"]},{"required":["standard_metaobjects"]}],"properties":{"app":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaobjectsCollection"},"standard_metaobjects":{"$ref":"#/definitions/StandardMetaobjectDefinitionTemplates"}},"title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects","description":"App namespaces for metaobjects."},"MetaobjectsCollection":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaObject"},"title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects","description":"Each entry here represents a metaobject definition. For instance, `[metaobjects.app.author]` becomes a metaobject definition of type `$app:author`."},"MetaObject":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["fields"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects","description":"The human-readable name."},"description":{"type":"string","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects","description":"The administrative description."},"display_name_field":{"type":"string","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects","description":"The key of a field to reference as the display name for each object."},"fields":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaobjectFieldCollection"},"capabilities":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaobjectCapabilities"},"access":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaobjectAccessControls"}},"title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects","description":"Metaobjects are custom data structures that your app can define and create to store your app's information. Similar to [metafields](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/custom-data/metafields), they can be associated with a Shopify resource such as a product or a collection. However, they can also exist on their own. Metaobjects provide you with a way to create resources that Shopify doesn't offer out of the box.

Users can define their own metaobjects or use the ones that your app creates to extend their shop's data model. Metaobjects are also available in themes using Liquid, Storefront API, and Admin API."},"MetaobjectFieldCollection":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"oneOf":[{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaFieldDefinitionTypes"},{"$ref":"#/definitions/FieldObject"}]},"title":"Custom Data > Metaobject Fields","description":"Metaobjects enable app users and app developers to define custom objects in Shopify. This guide shows you how to get started with creating and managing metaobjects and metaobject definitions using the GraphQL Admin API."},"MetaobjectCapabilities":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects","description":"The capabilities of the metaobject definition.","properties":{"publishable":{"type":"boolean","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects > Publishable","description":"The publishable capability enables users of your metaobject to set its status to either DRAFT or ACTIVE. This can be useful for providing users a way to stage their content before making it available to their storefronts - even if you defined it to be available to storefronts using access controls."},"translatable":{"type":"boolean","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects > Translatable","description":"The translatable capability allows the fields of a metaobject to be translated. You can be enable this capability by setting translatable to true when performing a metaobjectDefinitionCreate or metaobjectDefinitionUpdate mutation."},"renderable":{"type":"boolean","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects > Renderable","description":"The renderable capability exposes metaobject SEO fields to Liquid and the Storefront API. Metaobjects with this capability are also included in the store's sitemap, which is sitemap.xml for Liquid storefronts and accessible using the Sitemap query in the Storefront API."},"renderable_meta_title_field":{"type":"string","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects > Renderable"},"renderable_meta_description_field":{"type":"string","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects > Renderable"}}},"MetaFieldDefinitionTypes":{"type":"string","oneOf":[{"type":"string","pattern":"^(?<type>(list\.)?(metaobject_reference|mixed_reference))<(?<references>((\$app:)?[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+(,\s*)?)+)>$"},{"type":"string","enum":["boolean","color","date_time","date","dimension","id","json","language","link","list.color","list.date_time","list.date","list.dimension","list.link","list.number_decimal","list.number_integer","list.rating","list.single_line_text_field","list.url","list.volume","list.weight","money","multi_line_text_field","number_decimal","number_integer","rating","rich_text_field","single_line_text_field","url","volume","weight","company_reference","list.company_reference","customer_reference","list.customer_reference","product_reference","list.product_reference","collection_reference","list.collection_reference","variant_reference","list.variant_reference","file_reference","list.file_reference","product_taxonomy_value_reference","list.product_taxonomy_value_reference","metaobject_reference","list.metaobject_reference","mixed_reference","list.mixed_reference","page_reference","list.page_reference","article_reference","list.article_reference","order_reference","list.order_reference"]}],"title":"Custom Data > Types","description":"Set the [data type](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/custom-data/metafields/list-of-data-types) of the metafield.

Each [metafield](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/custom-data) and [metafield definition](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/custom-data/metafields/definitions) has a type, which defines the type of information that it can store. The metafield types have built-in validation and [Liquid](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/liquid/objects/metafield) support."},"FieldObject":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["type"],"properties":{"type":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaFieldDefinitionTypes"},"name":{"type":"string","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects > Metafields","description":"The human-readable name."},"description":{"type":"string","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects > Metafields","description":"The administrative description."},"required":{"type":"boolean","title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects > Metafields","description":"Required status of the field within the metaobject composition."},"default_value":{"type":["number","string","object","array","boolean"],"title":"Custom Data > Metaobjects > Metafields > Default Value","description":"The default value for new metafields of this field definition."},"validations":{"$ref":"#/definitions/ValidationRule"},"capabilities":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaobjectFieldCapabilities"}}},"ValidationRule":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":["number","string","object","array"]},"title":"Custom Data > Validation Rules","description":"Validation options enable you to apply additional constraints to the data that a metafield can store, such as a minimum or maximum value, or a regular expression. This guide shows you how to manage validation options using the GraphQL Admin API."},"MetaobjectFieldCapabilities":{"type":"object","title":"Field Capabilities","description":"Configure field-level features and behaviors","additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"admin_filterable":{"type":"boolean","title":"Admin Filterable","description":"Allow this field to be used for filtering in the Shopify admin"}}},"MetafieldsCollection":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"$ref":"#/definitions/Metafield"},"title":"Custom Data > Metafields","description":"A namespace for metafields. `.app` places metafields under the `$app` namespace; `.other` places metafields under the `$app:other` namespace."},"Metafield":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["type"],"title":"Custom Data > Metafields","description":"Metafields are a flexible way for your app to add and store additional information about a Shopify resource, such as a product, a collection, [and many other owner types](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/enums/MetafieldOwnerType). The additional information stored in metafields can be almost anything related to a resource. Some examples are specifications, size charts, downloadable documents, release dates, images, or part numbers.

Merchants and other apps can retrieve and edit the data that's stored in metafields from the Shopify admin. You can also access metafields in themes using Liquid and through the Storefront API.","properties":{"type":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetaFieldDefinitionTypes"},"name":{"type":"string","title":"Custom Data > Metafields","description":"The human-readable name of the metafield definition."},"description":{"type":"string","title":"Custom Data > Metafields","description":"The description of the metafield definition."},"default_value":{"type":["number","string","object","array","boolean"],"title":"Custom Data > Metafields > Default Value","description":"The default value for new metafields of this definition."},"validations":{"$ref":"#/definitions/ValidationRule"},"capabilities":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetafieldCapabilities"},"access":{"$ref":"#/definitions/MetafieldAccessControls"}}},"MetafieldCapabilities":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"title":"Custom Data > Metafields","description":"The capabilities of the metafield definition.","properties":{"admin_filterable":{"type":"boolean","title":"Custom Data > Metafields > Admin Filterable","description":"The admin filterable capability allows you to use a metafield definition and its values to filter resource lists in the Shopify admin. This capability makes it easier for merchants to find and manage resources such as products based on their specific metafield values."},"unique_values":{"type":"boolean","title":"Custom Data >
